---
title: "_bootstrap.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/sentinel/_bootstrap.py"
loc: 30
complexity: 4
logic_score: 4.90
style_score: 3.83
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.33
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating SovereignBootstrap, execute.

## Interaction Protocol
Import SovereignBootstrap and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 22 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [dotenv](file://dotenv)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.utils](file://src.core.utils)
- [logging](file://logging)

### Exports
- `SovereignBootstrap`
- `execute`
